code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let text = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(text)
  mut count = 0
  mut i = 0
  mut last_nl = true
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(text, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 10
      count = count + 1
      last_nl = true
    else
      last_nl = false
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not last_nl
    count = count + 1
  end
  print("lines=#{count}")
end
